revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{History of Japan |all}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}} == Usage == {{Collapsible lists option |listnames=periods, topics}} ===Full syntax=== :{{History of Japan |''listname'' |image= |imagesize= |caption=}} * ''listname'' specifies which of the template's lists is expanded (see above). * When image= is used, the picture is changed. * When imagesize= is used, the picture size is changed (default is 185px). * When caption= is used, a caption is added to the picture. ===Examples=== *{{History of Japan}} :or *{{History of Japan |periods}} :or *{{History of Japan |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :or *{{History of Japan |topics |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |imagesize=280px |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :etc. == See also == {{History of Asia templates |collapsed}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan history sidebar templates| ]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{History of Japan |all}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}} == Usage == {{Collapsible lists option |listnames=periods, topics}} ===Full syntax=== :{{History of Japan |''listname'' |image= |imagesize= |caption=}} * ''listname'' specifies which of the template's lists is expanded (see above). * When image= is used, the picture is changed. * When imagesize= is used, the picture size is changed (default is 185px). * When caption= is used, a caption is added to the picture. ===Examples=== *{{History of Japan}} :or *{{History of Japan |periods}} :or *{{History of Japan |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :or *{{History of Japan |topics |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |imagesize=280px |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :etc. == See also == {{History of Asia templates |collapsed}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan history sidebar templates| ]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{History of Japan |all}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}} == Usage == {{Collapsible lists option |listnames=periods, topics}} ===Full syntax=== :{{History of Japan |''listname'' |image= |imagesize= |caption=}} * ''listname'' specifies which of the template's lists is expanded (see above). * When image= is used, the picture is changed. * When imagesize= is used, the picture size is changed (default is 185px). * When caption= is used, a caption is added to the picture. ===Examples=== *{{History of Japan}} :or *{{History of Japan |periods}} :or *{{History of Japan |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :or *{{History of Japan |topics |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |imagesize=280px |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :etc. == See also == {{History of Asia templates |collapsed}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan history sidebar templates| ]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{History of Japan |all}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}} == Usage == {{Collapsible lists option |listnames=periods, topics}} ===Full syntax=== :{{History of Japan |''listname'' |image= |imagesize= |caption=}} * ''listname'' specifies which of the template's lists is expanded (see above). * When image= is used, the picture is changed. * When imagesize= is used, the picture size is changed (default is 185px). * When caption= is used, a caption is added to the picture. ===Examples=== *{{History of Japan}} :or *{{History of Japan |periods}} :or *{{History of Japan |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :or *{{History of Japan |topics |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |imagesize=280px |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :etc. == See also == {{History of Asia templates |collapsed}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Japan history sidebar templates| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=History_of_Japan%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{History of Japan |all}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}} == Usage == {{Collapsible lists option |listnames=periods, topics}} ===Full syntax=== :{{History of Japan |''listname'' |image= |imagesize= |caption=}} * ''listname'' specifies which of the template's lists is expanded (see above). * When image= is used, the picture is changed. * When imagesize= is used, the picture size is changed (default is 185px). * When caption= is used, a caption is added to the picture. ===Examples=== *{{History of Japan}} :or *{{History of Japan |periods}} :or *{{History of Japan |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :or *{{History of Japan |topics |image=Satsuma-samurai-during-boshin-war-period.jpg |imagesize=280px |caption=[[Samurai]] of the [[Satsuma clan]]}} :etc. == See also == {{History of Asia templates |collapsed}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Japan history sidebar templates| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
